creator: Alexander Terp
description:
The biggest issue: no way to escape { in strings

  The regex constraint "\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}" silently interpreted {4}, {2}, {2} as string interpolation, producing the regex \d-\d-\d. I had to write "\\d\\d\\d\\d-\\d\\d-\\d\\d" instead. This would also bite
  anyone trying to build a JSON string manually, write a format pattern, or any string containing literal braces. Most languages with interpolation use {{ for a literal { - that would solve it cleanly.
title: escaping interpolation apparently unclear
